name: Talib Kweli
abstract: Talib Kweli Greene ( ta-LIHB kwa-LEE; born October 3, 1975) is an American rapper. He is one half of the hip-hop duo Black Star, which he formed in 1997 with fellow Brooklyn rapper Mos Def.

concerts.label: The Music of Prince
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

concerts.label: Pathway to Paris
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

about_quotes.speaker: Gap Mangione
about_quotes.evidence: I have to admit I never even had heard his name before... his organization called and asked for permission, and we worked out a deal.
about_quotes.doc_title: Gap Mangione interviewed by Monk Rowe, Rochester, New York, January 11, 2012
